reviews.comment:
Siempre bien! Baños limpios. La cola para cargar es organizada. Tienen QR y contactless, pero si pagas con QR, no te hace el descuento del ACA

(Translated by Google)
Always good! Clean bathrooms. The line to fill up is organized. They have QR and contactless payment methods, but if you pay with a QR code, you don't get the ACA discount.

reviews.comment:
La atención en ésta estación de servicio del ACA es PÉSIMA. Uno va por los descuentos. Algún superior debe hacer algo. Siempre es pérdida de tiempo. Los empleados no se preocupan por nada. HAGAN ALGO! Después no se quejen si lo cierran.

(Translated by Google)
The service at this ACA gas station is TERRIBLE. People go there for the discounts. Someone in charge should do something. It's always a waste of time. The employees don't care about anything. DO SOMETHING! Don't complain if they close it down.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5NDZDQXlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Que se puede decir del ACA?Hace muchos años que voy y siempre buena atencion y algun descuento a los socios.El lavadero muy bueno lo mismo los talleres.

(Translated by Google)
What can I say about the ACA? I've been going for many years and the service is always good, and members get some discounts. The car wash is very good, as are the workshops.
